name: Diabetes Type 2
description: A chronic condition that affects the way the body processes blood sugar (glucose)

name: Hypertension
description: High blood pressure - a condition in which the force of the blood against the artery walls is too high

name: Asthma
description: A respiratory condition marked by attacks of spasm in the bronchi of the lungs

name: Arthritis
description: Inflammation of one or more joints, causing pain and stiffness

name: Heart Disease
description: A range of conditions that affect the heart

name: Chronic Kidney Disease
description: A condition characterized by a gradual loss of kidney function over time

name: COPD
description: Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease - a group of lung diseases that block airflow

name: Depression
description: A mental health disorder characterized by persistently depressed mood
